reforms.description: An investment tax credit was introduced for the first time, aimed at encouraging investments in energy-saving and pollution control initiatives.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The tax credit incentivizes firms to invest in energy efficiency, which can lead to lower operational costs and enhanced competitiveness.
reforms.status_evidence: The investment tax credit was introduced for the first time.
reforms.importance_rationale: The introduction of the investment tax credit represents a significant policy shift aimed at promoting energy efficiency and environmental sustainability.
reforms.source_quote: A tax credit was also given in 1978 to specific types of energy-saving investment.
